chapter_title.en: Chapter on Miscellaneous Narrations Regarding Tawaf.

text: 2835 - رَوَى عَاصِمُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَطُوفُ وَ يَسْعَى ثُمَّ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ تَطَوُّعاً قَبْلَ أَنْ يُقَصِّرَ قَالَ «مَا يُعْجِبُنِي ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2835 - Asim ibn Humayd narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, who said:
"I asked Abu Ja'far (as) about a man who performs Tawaf and Sa'i and then performs additional Tawaf around the Ka'bah voluntarily before cutting his hair (Taqsir).
Imam (as) said: 'I do not approve of it.'"
